title: 'Trump is your president': White house 'inserts' itself into Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding celebrations
summary_full: The White House playfully spoofed Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding announcement, altering a New York City billboard to read "Trump is your president." This social media jab follows Donald Trump's own Eras Tour-inspired graphic and his history of public criticism towards Swift, particularly after her endorsement of Kamala Harris. Despite past harsh words, Trump had offered a more positive sentiment regarding the couple's engagement.
